themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties in Spain, Italy, and other European countries are increasingly advocating for 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to public services, healthcare, and social benefits. This theme has sparked constitutional debates and political clashes, particularly in regional governments where coalitions with far-right parties are forming.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox pushes 'national priority' policies in regional governments, demanding constitutional changes to prioritize Spanish citizens in healthcare and social services.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Lega and Fratelli d'Italia support regional policies that prioritize Italian citizens, aligning with Vox's rhetoric in Spain.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN advocates for policies that prioritize French citizens in public services, echoing the 'national priority' rhetoric.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD promotes policies that prioritize German citizens, particularly in welfare and immigration debates.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK advocates for policies that prioritize British citizens in social benefits and public services, aligning with the broader European trend.

themes.title: Far-right parties surge in European polls
themes.blurb: Far-right parties across Europe are experiencing a surge in polling numbers, reflecting growing public dissatisfaction with mainstream parties. This trend is evident in Germany, France, Italy, and Sweden, where far-right parties are either leading or gaining significant ground in recent polls.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD leads in multiple polls, surpassing traditional parties like CDU/CSU in some regions.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN leads in French polls ahead of the 2027 presidential election, with Marine Le Pen positioning herself as the frontrunner.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Both parties maintain strong polling numbers, with Lega pushing for constitutional reforms to solidify their influence.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Sweden Democrats continue to gain support, influencing national policies on immigration and welfare.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox maintains strong regional influence, particularly in coalitions with the PP, and continues to shape national debates on immigration and sovereignty.

themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Donald Trump's policies and rhetoric continue to shape right-wing discourse globally, with far-right parties in Europe and beyond adopting similar stances on immigration, nationalism, and anti-establishment sentiment. Trump's influence is particularly strong in the UK, Spain, France, and Italy, where his policies are frequently cited as models.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's policies on immigration, nationalism, and economic protectionism are central to right-wing discourse in the U.S. and abroad.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK frequently cites Trump's policies as a model for UK immigration and economic reforms.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox aligns with Trump's anti-immigration and nationalist rhetoric, often referencing his policies in their campaigns.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN adopts Trump-like rhetoric on immigration and sovereignty, positioning itself as a defender of French national identity.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Both parties reference Trump's policies on immigration and economic nationalism, particularly in their critiques of the EU and globalism.

themes.title: Hungary’s political shift under new leadership
themes.blurb: Hungary's political landscape is undergoing a significant transformation following the election of Péter Magyar as prime minister. Magyar's government is seeking to reset relations with the EU, dissolve controversial institutions like the Sovereignty Protection Office, and address corruption allegations linked to the previous Orbán administration. This shift is closely watched by neighboring countries, particularly Poland, which shares similar political dynamics.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Magyar's Tisza Party has taken power, promising to dissolve the Sovereignty Protection Office and reset EU relations.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: PiS closely monitors Hungary's political shift, particularly Magyar's anti-corruption efforts and EU negotiations.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD observes Hungary's political changes, particularly Magyar's efforts to distance himself from Orbán's policies.

countries.name: 🇪🇺 EU Relations
countries.note: The EU is engaging with Magyar's government to unlock frozen funds and address rule-of-law concerns.

themes.title: Far-right rhetoric fuels political violence
themes.blurb: Far-right rhetoric across Europe and the U.S. is increasingly linked to incidents of political violence, including arson attacks, protests, and threats against political figures. This trend is evident in Italy, Spain, the UK, and the U.S., where far-right leaders and their supporters have been targeted or implicated in violent incidents.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Far-right rhetoric in Italy has led to protests and threats against political figures, particularly over immigration policies.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox's rhetoric has sparked protests and clashes, particularly in regions where they hold power.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK leaders, including Nigel Farage, have faced arson attacks and threats linked to their political rhetoric.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's rhetoric has been linked to multiple assassination attempts and threats against political figures.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN's rhetoric has sparked protests and counter-protests, particularly over immigration and national identity issues.
